Iii . of the fruit of true and serious repentance . our saviour cry , repent , repent , as John that before our saviour go . the foundation and beginning of holy life be save repentance . for where there be true repentance , there be remission of sin : and where there be remission of sin , there be the grace of God : and where there be the grace of God , there be Christ : and where Christ be , there be his merit : and where there be Christ merit , there be satisfaction for sin : and where there be satisfaction for sin , there be righteousness : and where there be righteousness , there be joy and tranquillity of conscience : and where there be tranquillity of conscience , there be the holy spirit : and where the holy spirit be , there be the sacred and holy Trinity : and where the holy Trinity be , there be eternal life : therefore where there be true repentance , there be eternal life . where there be not true repentance , neither be there remission of sin , nor the grace of God , nor Christ , nor his merit , nor satisfaction for sin , nor righteousness , nor tranquillity of conscience , nor the holy spirit , nor the holy Trinity , nor eternal life . why therefore do we defer our repentance ? and why do we procrastinate it from day to day ? to morrow be not we , and to repent true be not in our power : and in the day of judgement we must give a account not only for to morrow , but also for the present day . to morrow be not so certain , as the destruction of the impenitent be certain . Xxviii . general rule of a godly life . he|be only wise who God do know , and do by life his knowledge show . every day thou draw near to thy death , judgement , and eternity : therefore think every day how thou may be able to stand in that most strict and severe judgement , and so live for ever . look diligent unto thy thought , word , Eccles. 12.14 . and deed , because hereafter thou must give a exact account for all thy thought , word , and deed . Every evening think that thou shall die that night : every morning think that thou shall die that day . do not defer thy conversion and good work till to morrow ; because to morrow be uncertain , but death be certain , and hang over thy head every day . Nothing be more contrary to godliness than delay : if thou contemn the inward call of the holy spirit , thou shall never attain to true conversion . Ecclus 18.22 . defer not thy conversion and good work till thy old age ; but offer unto God the flower of thy youth . it be uncertain whether the young man shall live till he be old : but it be certain that destruction be prepare for the young man which be impenitent . no age be fit for god service , than youth which flourish in strength both of body and mind . for no man sake undertake a evil cause ; for it be not that man but God that shall hereafter judge thou . do not therefore prefer the favour of man before the grace of God . in the way of the lord either we go forward , or else we go backward : therefore examine thy life every day whether thou go forward or backward in the study of piety . to stand in the way of the lord , be to go back : do not delight then to stand still in the course of godliness ; but study always to walk in the way of the lord .
